title: Batch 7 Oracle Sibling Capsule Standard
source_authority_ref: microcosm-substrate/AXIOMS.md#1 (JSON is contract; Markdown is projection)

requirements.description: The source_module_manifest must exact-copy non-secret Oracle sibling source bodies and focused original test witnesses from the macro repo.
The organ must execute subject_index.run, subject_snapshot.run, truth_diff_macro.run, and deterministic run_quartet planning/materialization on temporary run fixtures.
The organ must run the focused original pytest witness and keep stdout/stderr bodies out of receipts.
run_quartet.run_missing_quartet and GodModeEngine invocation must remain explicitly excluded from this public-safe capsule.
Negative fixtures must cover missing subject run, missing artifact id, missing truth run, run_missing exclusion, and missing original pytest witness.
The capsule must deny Oracle reasoning, provider/browser, GodModeEngine, source mutation, operator-thread, release, and semantic truth authority.

validation_rules: validate required public source refs and target refs remain public-safe
bind validator_refs and receipt_refs before active v2 source-standard projection

keep registry acceptance, release, provider/browser dispatch, GodModeEngine authority, source mutation, private-root equivalence, runtime correctness, and whole-system correctness outside this contract
treat generated coverage, health, Mermaid, and Atlas surfaces as projections, not source evidence
receipt_expectations: receipt must cite validator command or focused test evidence, authority_ceiling, omissions, and anti_claims
receipt must not contain source bodies, private paths, credentials, provider payloads, or operator thread content
anti_claim: The Batch7 oracle sibling capsule standard is active as a source JSON contract only; this does not authorize Oracle reasoning, provider/browser dispatch, GodModeEngine execution, source mutation, operator-thread authority, release, private-root equivalence, accepted-organ registry metadata changes, runtime correctness, or whole-system correctness.
anti_claims: Active v2 source-standard status is not release or publication authority.
The receipt ref is support routing for this standard contract, not proof of semantic truth or whole-system correctness.
This source-standard activation does not mutate core/standards_registry.json or accept any organ.

standard_payload.ontology: A standard contract for the Oracle sibling public-safe fixture and validation surfaces.
standard_payload.teleology: Make the Batch7 oracle sibling capsule walkable as an active governed standard while excluding Oracle reasoning and GodMode authority.
standard_payload.anti_purpose: An Oracle reasoning grant, provider/browser execution grant, GodModeEngine permission, release approval, or semantic truth claim.

contract_projection_basis.authority_boundary: computed standard-lattice contract only; source refs and receipt refs do not grant release, provider/browser dispatch, registry acceptance, private-root equivalence, Oracle reasoning, GodModeEngine authority, runtime correctness, or whole-system correctness authority.

author.purpose: create a valid Batch7 oracle sibling capsule instance

refine_instance.purpose: improve an existing Batch7 oracle sibling capsule without corrupting authority

refine_standard_and_propagate.purpose: change std_microcosm_batch7_oracle_sibling_capsule and propagate through governed artifacts plus generated lattice projections

doctrine_kind_envelope.note: This standard conforms to the universal doctrine-kind envelope; markdown, Mermaid, Atlas, coverage, health, and entry-card views are generated projections of this JSON source.

selective.rule: relationships.used_by_organs declares route pressure only; it does not accept organs or prove runtime use

lattice_edges.authority_boundary: declared contract topology only; generated relation coverage remains computed by build_doctrine_projection.py

instance_schema.note: Required keys are projected from this standard source required_fields list; schema validation remains validator-owned.

schema_check.rule: instance validates against required_fields and this standard contract

source_boundary.rule: public instances cite source_refs and preserve public_private_boundary; private/raw/provider bodies are not exported

link_resolution.rule: required lattice edge targets resolve to governed instance ids; selective unresolved targets remain typed residual pressure

projection_freshness.rule: generated coverage, health, projection, and entry-card views are regenerable from JSON source

coverage_health.note: computed health; never evidence for source claims

compression.rule: preserve authority boundary and anti-claim before any status/count summary
